title: TDDTest-Driven Development
description: TDDTest-Driven Development documents overview material for TDDTest-Driven Development in the language domain. It is classified as a concept page, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights 테스트 크기, 테스트 범위, 테스트 코드, 테스트 대역Test Double, and Stub, Mock, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include tdd, test, language, and concepts, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is language / concepts / tdd, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
